core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Sacred Geometry x Swiss Precision
Content is King: Data must be readable in direct sunlight
Negative Space: Breathable layouts for high-stress environments
Contrast: High visibility for field operations

grid_strategy.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 lg:gap-6

rtl_handling.utilities: Use logical properties (ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*) instead of left/right where possible

mobile_navigation.structure: flex items-center justify-around bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-border/40 z-50 fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0

map_interface.desktop_view: h-full w-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-border/50

controls.position: absolute bottom-24 left-4 flex flex-col gap-2

bottom_sheet.content: Zone Name, Density %, Employee Count, Status Toggle

prayer_rounds_bar.container: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-3 p-1 pb-4 no-scrollbar
prayer_rounds_bar.item: min-w-[140px] snap-center rounded-lg border p-3 flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-all

general: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic - no generic gradients or centered layouts without purpose.
Dark colors must be solid, not gradients.
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md or xl with semi-transparent white/black.
NO 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
Do NOT center align the App container.
Export components as named exports, Pages as default exports.
rtl_specifics: Ensure icons like 'ArrowRight' are flipped or swapped for 'ArrowLeft' in logic if needed, or rely on 'dir=rtl' support.
Margins/Paddings: Use 'ps' (padding-start) and 'pe' (padding-end) for RTL safety.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update layout wrapper to support Mobile Bottom Nav (conditionally rendered on small screens).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Refactor Map component to use Drawer for mobile details instead of floating panels.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Update Toolbar to use DropdownMenu for overflow items on mobile.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Apply 'E1' spacing and typography updates globally.
